changePolicy: Requirements may only be removed or semantically changed with explicit owner approval.

requirements.title: Complete categorized demo gallery
requirements.acceptance: The demo exposes all public modules, keeps product categories distinct, and provides replay controls for inspectable text and entrance motion.

requirements.title: Live settings playground and code copy
requirements.acceptance: Every adjustable demo exposes relevant live settings, replay, reset, synchronized HTML and JavaScript examples, and a working copy action without leaking Kineto instances.

requirements.title: Grouped number formatting
requirements.acceptance: Comma or locale grouping works in slot, plain, digit, and pop counter modes.

requirements.title: Direct digit cycling
requirements.acceptance: Digit mode cycles 0-9 by replacing glyphs without vertical reels.

requirements.title: Final-value pop landing
requirements.acceptance: Pop never counts up or cycles through intermediate values; the final formatted characters already exist and land one by one from a larger scale.

requirements.title: Circular progress loader
requirements.acceptance: Circular progress is a loader mode, not a counter mode, and exposes size, stroke, color and percent controls.

requirements.title: Progress bar loader
requirements.acceptance: A horizontal loading bar with progress and optional label is available as a loader mode.

requirements.title: Working pixelate reveal
requirements.acceptance: Pixelate reliably reveals the final image with configurable live-image pixel stages and does not freeze animated image formats.

requirements.title: Pixel stage controls
requirements.acceptance: Pixelate exposes explicit steps or pixelStart, pixelEnd and pixelStepCount plus delay, stepDuration and holdDuration.

requirements.title: True skeleton placeholder
requirements.acceptance: Skeleton is a temporary shimmer placeholder layer and is visually and structurally distinct from blur-up.

requirements.title: Progressive print scan
requirements.acceptance: Print starts as blurred image plus fine noise and resolves sharply in a configurable scan direction without square mosaic blocks or neon scan lines.

requirements.title: Dissolve reveal
requirements.acceptance: Dissolve removes global fine noise and blur across the whole image until the original is sharp, without directional wipe or simple opacity-only fade.

requirements.title: Content entrance classification
requirements.acceptance: Slide-up and wipe are reveal presets triggered by viewport entrance and are not lazy image-loading presets.

requirements.title: Working shuffle decode
requirements.acceptance: Shuffle visibly randomizes unresolved characters, resolves to the exact target text and can replay.

requirements.title: Working text transition
requirements.acceptance: Text transition measures a stable container, cycles visible items, exposes index and next, and can replay to the first item.

requirements.title: Original RGB slice glitch
requirements.acceptance: The default RGB glitch preserves the original three colored duplicate layers and intermittent horizontal slice bursts.

requirements.title: Android-style click ripple
requirements.acceptance: Clicking a button creates a circular Material-style ripple from the pointer location and cleans it up after animation.

requirements.title: Bounded pointer glow
requirements.acceptance: The default glow is a clipped single-color pointer spotlight with configurable radius, opacity, blur, spread, follow and sensitivity.

requirements.title: Configurable tilt response
requirements.acceptance: Tilt exposes angle, axis, sensitivity, smoothing, perspective, scale, reverse, reset and glare controls.

requirements.title: Card and button categories remain separate
requirements.acceptance: Card Glow and Tilt contains only card glow and tilt; magnetic, ripple, vibrate and mouse-parallax demos live in Pointer and Button Feedback.

requirements.title: Distinct MP3 overflow modes
requirements.acceptance: Overflow text animates only when needed and provides loop, bounce, rewind, once and page modes.

requirements.title: Masked rewind reset
requirements.acceptance: Rewind travels only toward the end, masks out, snaps invisibly to the beginning, masks in and repeats; it never animates backward like bounce.

requirements.title: Page-step display
requirements.acceptance: Page mode changes page-sized text segments using a directional mask instead of a plain tween or opacity-only transition.

requirements.title: Direction-responsive text motion
requirements.acceptance: Scroll velocity supports direction and speed-responsive skew, translate, rotate, scale and combo responses.

requirements.title: Horizontal pinned scroll
requirements.acceptance: Sticky stack includes a functioning configurable horizontal pinned scroll mode.

requirements.title: Floating pinned sequence
requirements.acceptance: Sticky stack includes a functioning floating pinned content sequence with configurable entry and previous-item treatment.

requirements.title: Full grouped lightbox viewer
requirements.acceptance: Lightbox covers the complete viewport and supports grouped navigation, captions, metadata, zoom, pan, minimap and custom UI hooks.

requirements.title: Working coverflow slider
requirements.acceptance: Coverflow displays centered active and adjacent preview slides and supports buttons, keyboard, drag, index state and cleanup.

requirements.title: Visible bounded ambient glow
requirements.acceptance: Ambient glow remains visible around the media instead of disappearing behind the page and restores original styles on destroy.

requirements.title: No runtime or lifecycle leaks
requirements.acceptance: Repeated create, replay and destroy leaves zero active instances, timers, generated UI or browser runtime errors in automated QA.

requirements.title: Animated image continuity
requirements.acceptance: GIF, APNG and animated WebP continue playing during lazy effects and after completion.

requirements.title: Dynamic fine noise
requirements.acceptance: Print and Dissolve noise changes continuously and does not expose an obvious repeating pattern.

requirements.title: Directional mask transitions
requirements.acceptance: Rewind and Page accept top-to-bottom, bottom-to-top, left-to-right and right-to-left mask directions.

requirements.title: Realtime ranking rolling
requirements.acceptance: Rolling mode changes multiple items vertically like a legacy realtime-search ranking ticker.

requirements.title: Surface reflection layer
requirements.acceptance: Card glow optionally renders a configurable pointer-responsive surface reflection gradient.

requirements.title: Luminous gradient border
requirements.acceptance: Card glow optionally renders a configurable gradient light along the card outline.

requirements.title: Directional entrance presets
requirements.acceptance: Reveal includes up, down, left and right slide/fade directions plus mask, wipe, zoom, blur, flip and rotate presets.

requirements.title: Designer class hooks
requirements.acceptance: Reveal can operate class-only and toggle configurable enter/leave classes for custom CSS.

requirements.title: Optional spring response
requirements.acceptance: Direction-responsive motion exposes spring on/off plus stiffness, damping, mass and response controls.

requirements.title: Working vertical sticky stack
requirements.acceptance: Vertical stack uses reliable CSS sticky positioning and restores owned styles on destroy.

requirements.title: Viewer UI customization
requirements.acceptance: Lightbox UI can be replaced or extended with custom HTML, CSS classes and render callbacks.

requirements.title: Composable animated media
requirements.acceptance: A media element can combine Lazy, Ambient and Lightbox without freezing GIF, APNG or animated WebP.

requirements.title: Image and video ambient glow
requirements.acceptance: Ambient glow supports live image clones and sampled video frames with configurable blur, opacity, saturation and brightness.

requirements.title: Custom cursor system
requirements.acceptance: Cursor supports dot, ring, blob, crosshair, image and custom templates with hover, press, label, color, size and smoothing options.

requirements.title: Real progress sources
requirements.acceptance: Loader accepts manual updates and can track window load, selected resources, promises and streamed fetch progress.

requirements.title: Optional Lenis smooth scrolling
requirements.acceptance: Smooth scrolling is disabled or enabled explicitly and exposes runtime enable, disable, toggle and scrollTo APIs.
